name: Heavenly Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt.
2. In a saucepan, heat butter until melted, then add sugar and water. Bring to a boil.
3. Remove from heat and stir in chocolate chips, vanilla extract.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Stir in the remaining flour mixture.
6. Fold in the remaining chocolate chips and chopped almonds.
7. Pour into an ungreased 9-inch pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for about 20 minutes or until set.
9. Cool completely before cutting into squares.
